extDescription.message: Supercharges Pinboard bookmarking with AI-powered tags, summaries, and a fully themeable interface.

cmdReadLater.message: Quick save as Read Later (no popup)

cmdMarkdownPreview.message: Convert page to Markdown preview (no popup)

uriTooLong.message: Request too long ($LEN$/$MAX$ chars). Shorten notes or tags.

urlWarning.message: This page cannot be saved to Pinboard (unsupported URL)

confirmLogout.message: Log out? Your API token will be removed.

aiErrorModelNotFound.message: The default model for $PROVIDER$ may be outdated — pick a model in Settings

aiErrorHostPermission.message: No access to $HOST$ — open Settings > AI and click Test to grant it

aiErrorModelNotFoundHint.message: Visit Settings > AI to select an available model

pinboardErrorRateLimit.message: Too many requests, try again later

pinboardErrorTimeout.message: Request timed out, try again later

bgSetToken.message: Set your API token in extension settings.

bgMdPreviewNoContent.message: No readable content was found on this page.

mdEngineExtractingNoteJina.message: First-time extraction fetches from Jina's cloud (r.jina.ai). The wait depends on whether this page is cached locally, your network speed, and the page size — usually a few seconds.

mdEngineExtractFailed.message: Couldn't extract this page. Please try again.

mdEngineTabGone.message: Source tab no longer available — reopen the page to use Defuddle

bgTabSetSaved.message: Pinboard: One more step to save

bgTabsSavedCount.message: $COUNT$ tabs sent — click Save on the opened Pinboard page to finish.

bgLoginRequired.message: Please log in to pinboard.in in your browser first.

resetTabTitle.message: Reset current tab settings to defaults

optRespectTagCase.message: Respect existing tag case (match most-used casing)

optShowSuggestTags.message: Show Pinboard suggested tags in popup

optShowAiSummary.message: Show AI summary button in popup

optShowAiTags.message: Show AI tags row in popup

optShowQuickRow.message: Show quick action buttons (Save Tabs · Batch Save · Markdown)

tagSyncPrewarmed.message: Prewarmed (background fetch every 15 min — instant popup)

tagSyncHint.message: Controls how your existing Pinboard tag cloud is pulled into the popup for autocomplete. Tags are read-only; nothing is uploaded back to Pinboard.

tagPresetsPlaceholder.message:
One preset per line:
Work: project, review, report
Dev: programming, tutorial, tool

tagPresetsHint.message: Format: Name: tag1, tag2, tag3 — shown as quick-add buttons in popup.

optCheckBookmarkStatus.message: Show bookmark status via icon (check if current page is saved)

backupHint.message: Export/import your settings (API keys are excluded from export for security).

importPartial.message: Imported — themes saved locally (sync quota full); reload to see changes

qsHint.message: Save the current page instantly via keyboard shortcut (without opening popup).

rlHint.message: Save current page as "Read Later" via keyboard shortcut. Automatically marks as unread.

batchHint.message: Save each open tab as an individual bookmark.

batchTagsHint.message: Multiple tags separated by commas. E.g. batch_saved, research

batchAiTags.message: Auto-generate AI tags for each tab

batchAiSummary.message: Auto-generate AI summary for each tab

batchAiHint.message: AI features will be slow (separate AI call per tab + 3s rate limit). Requires "Access all websites" permission to read non-active tabs — prompted on first use.

batchPermDenied.message: Permission denied — AI features need access to all websites to read tab content.

hintOpenAIBaseUrl.message: Change for proxy or compatible endpoint

optAiAutoTags.message: Auto-generate AI tags on popup open

aiCacheHint.message: Cached per URL, up to 200 entries (LRU). Set 0 to disable.

promptsHint.message: Customize the prompts sent to the AI. Use placeholders: {{title}} {{url}} {{content}} {{description}} {{lang_instruction}} {{separator_instruction}}. Leave empty to use defaults.

tagPromptHint.message: Leave empty to use the default prompt shown above. Must instruct AI to return ["tag1","tag2"] format.

summaryPromptHint.message: Leave empty to use the default prompt shown above. Use {{lang_instruction}} for auto language.

popupFollowHint.message: When enabled, the popup appearance matches the selected Pinboard CSS theme.

optShowBadge.message: Show unread count badge on icon

optTagSortByPop.message: Add a “sort by popularity” control on tag pages

optTagSortByPopHint.message: On pinboard.in tag pages, adds a “pop” control that sorts the current page’s bookmarks by how many people saved each link; click again to restore.

customStyleHint.message: Inject custom CSS into pinboard.in pages. Useful for changing fonts, colors, layout etc.

customFontHint.message: Applied to body on pinboard.in. Leave empty to keep default.

themePresetsHint.message: Click a preset to load its CSS. Adaptive themes follow your Theme (light/dark) setting.

saveAsThemeHint.message: Save current CSS as a reusable theme.

saveTabsTitle.message: Save all open tabs as a tab set (requires pinboard.in login)

batchSaveTitle.message: Save each open tab as an individual bookmark

optSyncEnabled.message: Sync settings across devices via Google account

optSyncHint.message: When enabled, settings sync across Chrome installations signed into the same Google account.

aiContentSourceLocalHint.message: Extract the main content of the page locally (offline, fast).

aiContentSourceJinaHint.message: Fetch cleaned Markdown via Jina Reader API (requires network; API key optional for higher quota).

jinaAuthFailed.message: Jina API key is invalid or expired. Open Settings > Jina Reader to update it.

mdObsidianVaultHint.message: Leave empty to use the current vault.

mdObsidianFolderHint.message: Leave empty to save at the vault root.

mdObsidianEnabledHint.message: Shows the Send-to-Obsidian buttons in the preview page and the popup.

mdPreviewNoContent.message: No content was extracted from this page.

submitUriTooLong.message: Request too large — shorten notes, title, or tags

saveAsThemeDisabledHint.message: Modify Custom CSS first to save as theme

customCSSOverlayHelp.message: Your CSS is appended on top of the selected preset. Leave empty to use the preset only; rules written here override the preset's rules of the same name.

optSaveFailed.message: Save failed — settings too large to sync

aiErrorTryWith.description: Button label on AI error card to retry with a different provider

syncMigrationFailed.message: Sync migration failed. Please try again or reduce custom CSS size.

jinaFreeTierHint.message: Free tier: 20 RPM. Add key for higher quota.

mdPreviewEmpty.message: No preview data available. Please use the Markdown button in the popup first.

freeTierTitle.message: Which providers offer free API access?

freeTierZhipu.message: — free GLM-Flash models, 1 concurrent request; international access via z.ai (email signup).

freeTierOpenrouter.message: — :free models, 20 req/min; 50 req/day (1000/day after a one-time $10 credit purchase).

freeTierTrial.message: — signup credits that run out (DeepSeek ~5M tokens; MiniMax ~30-day trial).

freeTierOllama.message: — fully free, runs locally on your machine.

freeTierDisclaimer.message: Provider policies change frequently. Information above is current as of 2026-06 and may be inaccurate. Always verify current limits at signup.

optUrlCleanOnOpen.message: Clean when popup opens (silent, with undo link)

optUrlCleanAggressive.message: Aggressive mode: also remove ref/si/igshid and similar

optUrlCleanCustom.message: Custom parameters (one per line, appended to default list)

optUrlCleanExclude.message: Exclude parameters (one per line, never cleaned — e.g. keep affiliate tag=)

mdExportFrontmatter.message: Add YAML frontmatter to exported Markdown

mdExportImagePolicyHint.message: Applied when copying or downloading Markdown from the preview page. Can be overridden per export.

optBgSaveNoClobber.message: Merge tags in background saves (Quick Save / Read Later)

optBgSaveNoClobberHint.message: When enabled, background saves read your existing Pinboard bookmark (if any) and merge new tags with existing tags instead of replacing them. This prevents accidental tag loss on duplicate URLs. Note: adds ~3s per save for the extra API call. Foreground popup edits always replace (give you full control).

obsidianInstallHint.message: Obsidian must be installed for the note to open. Your note is also copied to the clipboard as a backup.

apiKeySecurityHint.message: API keys are obfuscated (not encrypted) and sync via chrome.storage.sync. Do not share your settings export files.

batchRevokeHint.message: Only needed if you enabled batch AI extraction but no longer want the extension to access all pages for content.

batchPermNone.message: No all-sites access is currently granted

optWayback.message: Archive saved pages to the Wayback Machine

optWaybackHint.message: After each save, ask the Internet Archive to snapshot the page (best effort, never blocks saving). Sends the saved URL to archive.org - off by default.

optWaybackBatchHint.message: Batch saves can fire many archive requests at once; anonymous quota is limited.

optWaybackS3Hint.message: With a free archive.org account key, archiving uses the authenticated API: higher quota, server-side dedup, reliable results.

waybackSkipPrivate.message: Never archive bookmarks you save as private

waybackPermDenied.message: Permission for web.archive.org was declined - archiving stays off.

archiveLogNote.message: A successful submission does not mean the snapshot is instantly visible - the Wayback Machine usually takes a few minutes (sometimes longer) to index new captures.

archiveErrBlocked.message: the site or URL is excluded from archiving

archiveErrNoAccess.message: page not accessible to the archiver (paywall or login)

archiveErrDailyLimit.message: daily capture limit reached for this URL

archiveErrServer.message: archive.org server error - try again later

archiveErrRateLimited.message: anonymous requests are rate-limited per IP - try later or add an S3 key

archiveErrTimeoutHint.message: the request timed out - archive.org may be busy or the network slow

tagGovResetIgnoredConfirm.message: Clear ignored groups and re-show all duplicates?

tagGovAiNoKey.message: No AI provider configured - set one up in the AI tab

tagGovNoLowCount.message: No tags with 1 use or fewer.

tagGovAborted429.message: Rate-limited — batch stopped, completed items saved. Re-running the same merge resumes safely (already-updated bookmarks are skipped).

tagGovLoadFailed.message: Could not load tags — check your Pinboard token or network, then Refresh

tagGovSnapshotSaved.message: Tag list snapshot downloaded (names and counts — reference for manual repair, not an automatic restore)

tagGovSnapshotFailed.message: Could not create snapshot — merge/delete blocked

tagGovIrreversibleWarn.message: Merges and deletions cannot be undone. A snapshot of your tag list (names and counts) is downloaded before the first change — for manual reference only.

tagGovBundlesWarn.message: Tag bundles on pinboard.in are not updated by renames — review them manually after merging.

optBgSaveModeMerge.message: Merge (default — combine new tags with existing)

optBgSaveModeSkip.message: Skip (if URL already saved, do nothing)

optBgSaveModeHint.message: Merge: reads existing bookmark tags and combines with new tags. Skip: avoids duplicate-URL saves. Overwrite: replaces tags entirely (foreground edits always replace).

previewAiSectionHint.message: Explain selection, ask the page, and full-text translation on the Markdown preview page. Uses the AI provider and key configured above; every request is user-invoked, nothing runs in the background.

previewAiEnabled.message: Enable AI features on the preview page

previewAiEnabledHint.message: Turning this off removes every AI entry point from the preview page. Entry points are also hidden automatically when no API key is configured.

previewAiModelHint.message: Model name used only by preview-page AI features, on the same provider as above. Leave empty to use the provider's default model.

translateLangCustomPlaceholder.message: Any language name, e.g. Latin, Classical Chinese

translateGlossaryHint.message: One rule per line, in the form term=translation. Leave the right side empty to keep the term untranslated. Sent with every translation request.

selectionTriggerIcon.message: Small button next to the selection

trShowOriginal.message: Click to temporarily show the original

askPlaceholder.message: Ask about this article... (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for a new line)

askEmptyHint.message: Answers cite the article paragraphs, so every claim can be checked.

askClearConfirm.message: Clear all questions and answers for this page?
